raw.message: Deine Pikmin begleiten dich, egal, wohin du gehst.

hook.summary: A group of colorful Pikmin characters run across a stylized map.
hook.visual_action: Various Pikmin carrying everyday items like a toothbrush and a toy train run across a light green map background.

scene_flow: A stylized light green map background is introduced.
A diverse group of Pikmin characters run across the map from left to right.
The text 'Los geht's mit den Pikmin!' appears over the map as characters continue to move.
The screen transitions to a white background with the Pikmin Bloom logo and a 'Download for free' button.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile users who enjoy cute characters and gamified walking or collection experiences.
